hooks.command: file=$(python3 -c 'import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get("tool_input",{}).get("file_path") or d.get("tool_response",{}).get("filePath") or "")'); case "$file" in *.yml|*.yaml) ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac; output=$(ansible-lint --offline "$file" 2>&1) && exit 0; F="$file" OUT="$output" python3 -c 'import json,os; print(json.dumps({"decision":"block","reason":"ansible-lint failed for "+os.environ["F"]+":\n"+os.environ["OUT"]}))'
